consent.title: Data Protection
consent.description: Our company is responsible for the processing of personal data collected via this platform. In accordance with the provisions of law n° 18-07 relating to the protection of individuals in the context of the processing of personal data, promulgated on June 10, 2018, the circulation of these data remains limited to the national territory.
consent.checkboxLabel: I have read and I accept the personal data protection policy
